Name.description: Identifier for this user. No spaces allowed.
Name.title: Name

accountId.description: The AWS account ID where Terraform state resources will be created. If specified, the system will verify that the current AWS credentials match this account before creating S3 buckets or DynamoDB tables, preventing accidental resource creation in the wrong account.
accountId.title: AWS Account ID

TerraformDynamoDBTable.description: The name of the DynamoDB table used for Terraform state locking. If not provided, will be auto-generated on first deployment.
TerraformDynamoDBTable.title: Terraform DynamoDB Table

TerraformStateBucket.description: The name of the bucket where the Terraform state for the packages will be stored. If not provided, will be auto-generated on first deployment.
TerraformStateBucket.title: Terraform State Bucket
